info.title: Lawmadi OS — Korean Legal AI
info.description: AI-powered Korean legal consultation with 60 specialized agents. Ask any Korean legal question and get verified, statute-grounded analysis. Supports Korean and English.

post.description: Routes your legal question to the most relevant specialist among 60 AI legal leaders covering labor law, housing, divorce, criminal law, tax, corporate, IP, immigration, and 52 more domains. Every statute citation is verified in real-time against Korea's official legislative database (law.go.kr). Returns structured legal analysis with action roadmap. Rate limit: 2 free queries per day.

query.description: Legal question in Korean or English. Be specific about your situation for better analysis.
examples: I signed a lease in Seoul but the landlord won't return my deposit. What are my options?

lang.description: Response language. 'ko' for Korean (default), 'en' for English.

200.description: Legal analysis response with verified statute citations

response.description: Full legal analysis with statute citations, action roadmap, and risk assessment

leader.description: Name of the specialist AI legal leader who handled the query (e.g., '담우' for labor law)

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Free tier allows 2 queries per day. Suggest the user visit https://lawmadi.com/pricing for credit packs.
